name: Tintas
author: Dieter Stein (2016); module by the Abstract Games factory
description: Tintas (Dieter Stein, 2016): 49 pieces in seven colours are scattered at random over a 49-cell hex board. Slide the shared pawn straight to the first piece in a line and collect it, chaining extra same-colour pickups. Collect all seven of one colour — or, once no colour can be completed, hold 4+ pieces in four different colours — to win.
